evidence: standards/specs/MICROBOARD_NONUI.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: Choose FlowBoard or another Board type when controller-backed state and its explicit lifetime contract are not required.
statement: A viewless Board keeps its lifecycle independent from its controller, attaches the controller using explicit input context then root context then Board context, communicates through buses, identity-filters only controller round trips, and releases the controller and observers before completion.
